title: task
description: resources.py:399-402 - render_put() accepts any hex string for from_hex without validating it's exactly 8 bytes (EUI-64). A malicious or buggy client could send arbitrary length, causing inconsistent state. Failure scenario: client sends from='aabb' (2 bytes), downstream code expecting 8-byte EUI-64 fails or truncates. Fix: validate len(eui64) == 8 after bytes.fromhex().
